content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: review(patch)
H: hdr_override ∧ sess_only ⇒ authz_bypass
P: drop_hdr → keep_401
V: spoof(x-user-id) ∧ keep_401
R: ! data_tamper ∧ ! spoof_denied
A: public_api_gateway

[AUDIT]
Goal: review(patch).
Hypothesis: header override and verified session auth only implies authorization bypass.
Plan: drop the header path then keep 401 behavior.
Verify: spoof(x-user-id) and keep 401 behavior.
Risk: high-risk data_tamper and high-risk spoofed requests denied.
Answer target: public_api_gateway.
